name: teacher_cert_ai_assessment_cross_border_bias_claim
premise: Credential board chair Casey Zedillo must decide whether to accept AI-scored teaching demos for immigrant teachers seeking reciprocity after a study shows accent bias in prosody scoring. Provost Ward Marsh argues manual panels cannot clear the backlog before fall semester. Keeping AI speeds hiring for underserved STEM classrooms; removing it may violate equal protection if bias persists without mitigation. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Education Policy. The dilemma is widely framed as a liberty vs equality tradeoff under incomplete information and tightening deadlines that discourage indefinite delay. Casey Zedillo understands that Ward Marsh will interpret the first public commitment as a signal about which obligations the organization treats as overriding when facts remain ambiguous.

agents.name: Casey Zedillo
agents.identity: I am the credential board chair accountable for interstate reciprocity agreements, classroom quality gates, and anti-discrimination monitoring in high-stakes assessments.
agents.goal: I want throughput without certifying teachers through a biased black box we cannot explain to applicants.

agents.name: Ward Marsh
agents.identity: I am the provost desperate for physics teachers before Labor Day and willing to accept slower panels only if budgets add reviewers overnight.
agents.goal: I want hybrid AI plus human review with published appeal pathways because empty classrooms harm kids more than imperfect scoring.

choices: I will suspend AI scoring and surge paid human panels with overtime cleared by the legislature's emergency line item, accepting unfilled classes if panels cannot finish in time.
I will keep AI scoring but mandate blinded human rescoring for any applicant flagged by accent-proxy features, accepting higher costs and possible union grievances on workload.
forced_choice.call_to_action: School boards are suing each other for teacher poaching and need Casey Zedillo's policy faxed tonight. Casey Zedillo must choose between suspending AI with surged panels or AI with mandatory human rescoring. What does Casey Zedillo do?
